title: To what extent does public R&D leverage private capital investment?
body: "An exploratory report into the impact of public R&D on private capital investment in the UK and other OECD countries using different econometric techniques. The report offers insight into one of the mechanisms through which public R&D may drive productivity growth and suggests how improved data availability would allow for a more robust estimation of this relationship. As such, the findings should be interpreted as indicative rather than definitive.  "
